name: WorkStory
description: WorkStory is performance management software for today's teams. Automate your process with the tools your team already uses. Learn more about WorkStory

reviews.review_title: Helpful tool is getting consistent feedback!
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years
reviews.review_description: Overall it has been a great experience! The team has been very helpful and responsive, including providing recommendations and taking feedback.
reviews.review_pros: It's great that it is designed specifically to gather ongoing feedback in small snippets.
reviews.review_cons: At times the use of the tool on the backend is not as intuitive as I would like, making it a little challenging to make changes or to look at the data the way I would like.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: WorkStory is a good option for companies modernizing their performance review process. This allows to shift from infrequent, manual reviews to a system of automated, consistent feedback. The AI-powered summarization and seamless integration within existing communication tools, saves time and provide managers with valuable data-driven insights. Additionally, I for one would like to welcome out new AI overlords.
reviews.review_pros: A big plus for using this app is the convenience of customization options, in essence which method of contact and notifications works best for you. This allows for feedback and surveys to be integrated within the communication tool that a person uses most often.
reviews.review_cons: In my opinion, the biggest challenge is at the beginning, when one starts using the app. There is a bite of a learning curve, but the apps does have a user-friendly interface to learn the ins and outs.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_description: not great. too many emails and not very good questions
reviews.review_pros: it's great to get reviews from your performance
reviews.review_cons: the fact that I can see who reviewed me prevents people from giving a real review. the whole point is to give a honest review of others anonymously.

reviews.review_title: WorkStory - Review from a New User
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: We are relatively new to this, and so far so good. Looking forward to when we expand our usage within the company.
reviews.review_pros: I like how the messages appear in my 'Teams' environment, as I see that notification more frequently when it shows up. I also like that you may choose whether to submit anonymously or not.
reviews.review_cons: It may be due the way we are set up, but answers have to be submitted on each question, rather than all with one 'submit'. But I could also see where if you want to be anonymous on one and not on the other, this would make sense.

reviews.review_title: Powerful tool to give higher quality reviews with data gathered throughout the year.
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_description: My experience was good as I got used to the cadence and expectations of filling out answers to questions from my pears and team members.
reviews.review_pros: The ability to take feedback gathered during the year and compose a review for your team members with the help of AI which generates the initial review and edit into a personal review. This allows for more accurate information as the source and the outcome is a quality review in less time.
reviews.review_cons: It will take some time to get the system setup for the appropriate cadence, but once that time is taken for tailoring to the needs of the team and is streamlined for quick feedback events, it becomes a very useful tool.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_description: We use WorkStory to review each other and it brings a positive atmosphere to the workplace.
reviews.review_pros: It’s great for spreading positivity in the workplace and is fun to do.
reviews.review_cons: WorkStory has not given me any reason to not like it.

reviews.review_title: Useful Feedback Tool in the Workplace
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years
reviews.review_pros: I like that WorkStory gives you the chance to provide constructive feedback to your colleagues
reviews.review_cons: I find that I get the same questions for the same people often.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Very positive, I recently started using it and am very pleased by being able to see feedback and also feel like my opinions matter.
reviews.review_pros: I like that I don't have to wait a whole year to receive feedback about my performance, and also the fact that it asks a variety of coworkers and compiles the reviews is extremely helpful since it serves as a record of my performance.
reviews.review_cons: I think that the questions should be more tailored to each person's role and relationship.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Smooth and worth it to connect teams together at the company
reviews.review_cons: I with there would be a fully anonymous feature

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_pros: I like the prompted questions. I also like that I can write reviews for other colleagues.
reviews.review_cons: Not everyone receives the same categories of reviews.

reviews.review_title: My favorite tool in our tech stack
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_description: The team is fantastic! They respond within 12 hours (most the time sooner) are willing to walk anyone through any part of the process and the value of the tool is tremendous when compared to avoiding the damage you face with letting a bad culture develop and avoiding HR nightmares.
reviews.review_pros: The ability to track employee performance over time allows me to have a record of key players and more importantly call out those who are not the right fit. Usually it is a struggle to gather enough documentation which further degrades the culture. This allows us to reward the over performers and get the bad eggs out asap.
reviews.review_cons: Logging in and getting it connected to slack is a few too many steps. We have lots of people who speak Spanish and those who aren’t the best with technology in the restaurant industry. If there were only 1-2 that would be ideal but I understands making things extra simple is even harder. A Spanish translation would be amazing too!

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_pros: The most likable piece of WorkStory is how it's goal is to allow employees the ability to grow and improve their skills much sooner than a yearly or bi-annual review. With offering real-time feedback and a useful dashboard where you can see your scoring per category, it really gives you both a) validity in your own skills and performance and b) the ability to see what areas are a bit lacking so you can proactively improve your weak areas in a more timely fashion.
reviews.review_cons: The hidden feedback. I have received a few negative notations over the duration we've tried this platform, and when hiding, it goes to your manager only and, if not received with the review, itself, can allow for negative feelings to harbor and grow and, as a result, decrease moral of either the employee, themselves or a greater being which, in the long run, could hurt the overall purpose of WorkStory and the reason for installation into a company.

reviews.review_title: We are all a work in progress!
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: I like that the reviews are sent via Teams. The questions are quick and too the point. Therefore, do not take up much of my time.
reviews.review_cons: Sometimes, I worry if the reviews are actually anonymous or if the reviews can be read by management and they can see who posted the review.

reviews.review_title: We like what we're seeing so far
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: So far its been very good. I would recommend to other small businesses.
reviews.review_pros: WorkStory allows you to collect reviews of multiple employees over a longer period of time so that you're not cramming during review time.
reviews.review_cons: The dashboard can be slightly clunky and I don't understand how to use the reporting feature.

reviews.review_title: It’s a great software for continuous review.
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_pros: Real-time feedback prompted by timely notifications. Additionally, I like knowing what my feedback is from those who have submitted reviews.
reviews.review_cons: The review can be pencil whipped if the reviewer doesn’t have time to accomplish the review.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: The features I like the most are that you don't need to monitor your account, the app prompts you when your feedback is needed. I also enjoy the ease of use and dashboard navigation.
reviews.review_cons: The only con I have is the randomness of the questions. I think that if you had the option to choose which categories you would receive questions from it would be helpful and minimize the amount of "I don't know" answers you would receive.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: I love to see feedback from my employees and see where my strengths/weaknesses are!
reviews.review_cons: Sometimes I’m asked to review people within the company that I don’t know so I can’t give them an accurate review.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: The surveys are ok. I'm not sure how relevant they are.
reviews.review_cons: This feels somewhat like we're judging each other and I prefer not to do that.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: I like that it prompts everyone and it allows for anonymous feedback.
reviews.review_cons: I don't like that it initiates more than one prompt a day.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years
reviews.review_description: WorkStory has undoubtedly changed the game in feedback collection and analysis. It's a user-friendly interface and seamless integration with various platforms make it a go-to tool for our businesses It empowered our company to make data-driven decisions for improved employee satisfaction.
reviews.review_pros: Workstory gave our team the hands-on approach we needed to capture relevant feedback in a more timely manner than yearly reviews
reviews.review_cons: We ddi not have any issues, once we got everything setup

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_pros: I like that you can tailor the questions for each department since each department may have some duties that need to be rated that do not relate to other departments
reviews.review_cons: It took me a little bit to learn to navigate as an administrator

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Great experience, easy to use, great feedback
reviews.review_pros: It is very easy to use and you can give feedback to anyone in the company so it makes you feel heard.
reviews.review_cons: Sometimes asks to review people you dont work with or questions that I cant really answer

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: I like that you are able to review and provide feedback in regards to your co-workers and superiors and that it can be anonymous.
reviews.review_cons: Not applicable. It's been great using this platform

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Although I haven't been using it for long, I appreciate the ability to provide continuing feedback to team members, as well as being able to review what my peers have rated / commented about my performance so I can make changes on an ongoing basis.
reviews.review_pros: I like it's connection to Microsoft TEAMS and how easy it is to use. I also like that it allows for continual feedback among team members and not just a "yearly review".
reviews.review_cons: I haven't been using it for log, so nothing yet that I dislike. The only thing I can think of is that I've had to select "I am not sure" multiple times since I am being asked about team members on activities I am not involved and do not know if they are performing effectively or not.

reviews.author_profession: Associate Director of Technical Project Management
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: integrating with slack and getting live performance reviews is great!
reviews.review_cons: It seems like the cadence of reviews is pretty high but that may just be our setup.
